list.name: point
list.label: Sample Point
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT point_code FROM v_lab_timeseries ORDER BY 1

list.name: param
list.label: Parameter
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT param_code FROM v_lab_timeseries ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT time AS "time", param_code AS metric, value FROM v_lab_timeseries WHERE point_code IN (${point:sqlstring}) AND param_code IN (${param:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time

SELECT time, point_code, param_name, value, unit, min_limit, max_limit FROM v_lab_timeseries WHERE point_code IN (${point:sqlstring}) AND param_code IN (${param:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 200
